name: Plastic Expandable Deep Pantry Bin - Brightroom™
description:
Add extra storage space in your pantry with the Plastic Expandable Deep Pantry Bin from Brightroom™. This pantry bin is designed in a rectangle shape with a deep design and an open top to help neatly organize the contents. Made of plastic in a clear design, this pantry bin also has side cutout handles for easy handling. Plus, the expandable design lets you adjust the bin for even more storage space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
